OUR SERVICES

Carpet Repairs

Carpet repair is an avenue you should first consider before throwing in the towel on your damaged carpet.

More

Carpet Seaming

Seam repair is needed when an existing seam has come undone. Often, the carpet is pulled up,

More

Carpet Weaving And Fraying

This carpet repair often occurs with looped pile carpet. Moving furniture or sometimes pets pull up

More

Carpet Restreching

Got waves or ripples in the carpet? Loose carpet causing tripping hazard? Call us today to get a free

FEATURES

Among Top Carpet Retailers in Melbourne

Being renowned carpet suppliers in Melbourne, we provide best Melbourne carpet layers at an affordable price. Call us at 0481399299 for cheap carpet flooring Melbourne

Carpet Selection

We can help you with selecting the right carpet for your house which fits in your budget and needs. Ask us today for a free quote and measure.

Low Price Carpet

We don’t deal with any middlemen to sell carpet for us so that the reason our prices are low and customers still enjoy the best quality at affordable prices. We bring samples to you.

Carpet Repair

Thinking about replacing the carpet because it has taken some damage overtime? How about contacting us to see if we can just repair it and save you from all the hassle of changing the whole carpet.

Rental Property Carpet Supply/Repair

Just want something not too expensive yet durable for your investment property? Contact us today for a free meaure and quote. We know exactly what you need to save you money and time.

HOW TO SELECT CARPET

Residential Carpets 6 Star Classification System
Room Foot Traffic Star Rating
Bedroom with light traffic flow Residential Light Duty 1
Living room or entertainment area with light to medium traffic flow Residential Medium Duty 2
A hallway or entertainment area with
heavy traffic flow		 Residential Heavy Duty 3 or 4
Areas with extra heavy traffic flow Residential Extra Heavy Duty 5 or 6

Testimonials

Talking About Perfect Melbourne Carpet

  • Perfect Carpet Repairs did a Carpets & Upholstery job for me in Diggers Rest and the job was completed on time, on budget, to a professional standard and with good communication.

    RodneyDiggers Rest

  • Gary was excellent. Communicated over the phone very well regarding price and work to be done. Quality of work excellent. 3 rooms carpeted.

    CampbellCotham

  • Responded to my query immediately. Very professional and knowledgeable. Great service and job very well done.
